Tutorials

  • Hands on Introduction to CALDERA, a Red-Blue Cyber Operations Automation Platform
  • Planning & Scheduling and Quantum Computing: what can they do for each other?
  • (cancelled) Efficient Neural-Symbolic Reasoning Via Reinforcement Learning
  • Representation learning for acting and planning: A top-down approach
  • CraftBots (co-run with IntEx Workshop)

Workshop and Tutorial Schedule

  • All Days
  • June 13th
  • June 14th
  • June 15th
  • June 16th
  • June 17th

Hands on Introduction to CALDERA, a Red-Blue Cyber Operations Automation Platform

Speakers: Corinne Magone, Ron Alford, Michael Kouremetis

Duration: half-day

Planning & Scheduling and Quantum Computing: what can they do for each other?

Speakers: Marco Baioletti, Angelo Oddi, Riccardo Rasconi

Duration: half-day

(cancelled) Efficient Neural-Symbolic Reasoning Via Reinforcement Learning

Speakers: Bo Liu, Daoming Lyu, Jianshu Chen, Akshat Kumar, Jiajing Ling

Duration: half-day

Representation learning for acting and planning: A top-down approach

Speakers: Blai Bonet and Hector Geffner

Duration: quarter-day

CraftBots (co-run with IntEx Workshop)

Speakers: Michael Cashmore and Liudvikas Nemiro

Duration: quarter-day

ICAPS is the premier forum for exchanging news and research results on theory and applications of intelligent planning and scheduling technology.

© 2022 ICAPS
